title: Cobblemon Modpack++
description: A fully rebuilt Cobblemon world packed with trainers, towns, legendaries, badges, breeding, UI upgrades, and exploration systems.
body: This modpack transforms your world into a dynamic, story-driven Pokémon-style adventure — blending Cobblemon’s core gameplay with world-generation upgrades, challenging trainers, progression systems, legendaries and myths, an economy, breeding mechanics and a polished UI experience.
